name: Hostaway Vacation Rental API
what_it_does: Hostaway REST API for vacation rental channel manager and property management platform. Enables AI agents to manage listings, calendars, reservations, rates, and guest communications across short-term rental channels (Airbnb, VRBO, Booking.com). Hostaway provides unified property management for vacation rental operators with multi-channel distribution and automation.
use_cases: Synchronizing availability and pricing across OTA channels from distribution management agents
Managing reservations and guest communication from rental operations agents
Automating housekeeping and maintenance task creation from turnover agents
Integrating rental performance data with analytics from revenue management agents
not_for: Long-term residential rental management without short-term rental focus
Single-property operators without multi-channel distribution needs
Hotel PMS without vacation rental workflows
best_when: A vacation rental management company or property manager using Hostaway wants AI agents to automate channel distribution, guest communication, and operations management across a rental portfolio.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Guest personal data from OTAs is subject to platform data sharing agreements. Automated guest communication must comply with platform terms.

auth.notes: Hostaway uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials for API access. Account-level credentials provided by Hostaway. Partner access requires developer program registration.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — vacation rental management SaaS pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-listing subscription; partner program for technology integrations
pricing.notes: Canadian-founded vacation rental technology company. Partner marketplace for integrations. API available for approved partners and enterprise customers.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in API docs

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Guest OTA data is subject to Airbnb/VRBO/Booking.com data sharing restrictions
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2 client credentials
OTA platform terms restrict some automated communication — verify per platform
Channel sync is bidirectional and real-time — conflicts require careful handling
Rate and availability updates must be accurate to avoid booking conflicts
Partner program approval required for production API access
agent_readiness.security_notes: Guest OTA data with platform data sharing restrictions. GDPR, SOC2. OAuth2. OTA platform terms apply to guest data usage.

security_score_components.security_notes: Guest OTA data. GDPR, SOC2. OAuth2. Platform data sharing restrictions apply.
